title: CMPD Officer Found Guilty in Domestic Violence Case
summary: A CMPD officer was found guilty in a domestic violence case. The department has not confirmed employment status.
charlotte_impact: Highlights accountability within law enforcement and raises concerns about domestic violence in the community.

title: Truist Championship Preparations Underway in Charlotte
summary: Charlotte prepares for the annual PGA Truist Championship, emphasizing local business impact and fan safety.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's ability to host major sporting events, boosting the local economy and tourism.

title: 50-Acre Wildfire Burns in Avery County
summary: Multiple agencies respond to a 50-acre wildfire near the Avery-Mitchell county line, posing environmental risks.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the threat of wildfires and the importance of coordinated emergency response efforts.

title: Suspect Arrested in Deadly Rock Hill Shooting
summary: D'Aaron Boyd Colston, 30, is arrested and charged with murder in connection to the death of Brandon Swilling.
charlotte_impact: Addresses violent crime and the ongoing efforts of law enforcement to bring perpetrators to justice.

title: Deadly Shooting Under Investigation in Rock Hill
summary: A shooting reported off Heckle Boulevard in Rock Hill is under investigation, adding to concerns about local violence.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety and well-being.

title: Man Killed in Lincoln County Lawn Mower Accident
summary: Larry Lail, 63, died after being struck by a vehicle while riding a lawn mower on Killian Road.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of road safety and the potential dangers of operating machinery near traffic.

title: Mooresville Appeals Release of Mayor Surveillance Video
summary: Mooresville appeals the release of a surveillance video allegedly showing Mayor Chris Carney without pants.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about public officials' conduct and transparency in local government.

title: Crews Respond to Brush Fire in Steele Creek Area
summary: Fire crews are responding to a spreading brush fire reported in the Steele Creek area around 8 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the risk of brush fires, especially during dry conditions, and the importance of fire safety.

title: Leaders Push for Data Center Regulation Changes
summary: Councilwoman Ajmera seeks a moratorium on data centers near residential areas while Charlotte develops regulations.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about the impact of data centers on residential neighborhoods and the need for regulation.

title: Rowan County School Evacuated Due to Electrical Odor
summary: An elementary school in Rowan County was evacuated due to an odor caused by an electrical issue; students returned later.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of safety protocols in schools and quick response to potential hazards.

title: Heat Returns This Afternoon and Into the Week
summary: The weather forecast predicts rising temperatures this afternoon and throughout the week, with rain chances later.
charlotte_impact: Provides essential weather information for residents to prepare for changing conditions.

title: Woman Indicted for Deadly Stabbing in Cornelius
summary: Makayla Hooks, 23, is indicted for the April 15 stabbing death of Demetri McGruder in Cornelius.
charlotte_impact: Covers a serious violent crime and the legal proceedings following the incident.

title: Suspect Denied Bond in Harris Teeter Stabbing
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, accused of stabbing a pregnant woman, was denied bond, facing assault charges.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a violent crime against a vulnerable victim and the legal consequences for the accused.

title: Two Men Charged in Deadly Alexander County Shooting
summary: Two men are charged in connection with a fatal shooting on Fairmont Court in Stony Point.
charlotte_impact: Details a deadly shooting incident and the subsequent legal actions taken by law enforcement.

title: Driver Faces Multiple Charges After I-85 Chase and Crash
summary: Christian Dos Santos faces 9 charges after a high-speed chase ended in a crash on I-85 South.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a dangerous high-speed chase and the potential consequences for the driver involved.
